channel.title: Lala Shakti Swarup Ray | Sustainable Embedded AI

item.title: FAME: Feature-Augmented Multi-View Ensemble Framework for Human Activity Recognition using Inertial Sensors
item.description: Citation: Calatrava-Nicolas, Francisco M., et al. “FAME: Feature-Augmented Multi-View Ensemble Framework for Human Activity Recognition using Inertial Sensors.” Companion of the 2025 ACM International Joint Conference on Pervasive and Ubiquitous Computing. 2025.

item.title: A Novel Local-Global Feature Fusion Framework for Body-Weight Exercise Recognition with Pressure Mapping Sensors
ClothFit: Cloth-Human-Attribute Guided Virtual Try-On Network Using 3D Simulated Dataset
